ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( NOT($Permission.C_PERM_8020_Bypass_Opp_V_RULE) , DateValue(CreatedDate) >= $Setup.CSET_9900__c.OppCutoverDate__c , Contains(fxRecordTypeName__c,'Sales') /*Default and Dealer, not INF*/ , TEXT(StageName)='Closed Lost' , OR( TEXT(Closed_Reason__c) = "" , LEN(Reason_Lost_Detail__c ) < 1 , fxMissingFields_CL__c <> "" )
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_072: Please ensure the Application Segment, Application Market, Application fields, plus Closed Reason & "Closed Reason Detail" are complete in order to mark as Closed Lost
